latest.title: Ancient trees keep this gothic church standing
latest.script_key: this gothic church leans but that ancient tree won t let it fall see those roots they re not just pretty they grip the stone like fingers in bread dough that s why the walls stay straight i always thought roots were delicate but these claws keep a 200 year old building from toppling

latest.title: Squirrels cheat the tree climb you think you know
latest.script_key: watch those back feet grip the bark like tiny cleats squirrels don t climb with their bellies they push off their hind claws so hard the claws hook into grooves you can t see that s why they vanish straight up trees tiny claws massive power imagine doing that barefoot ever slipped climbing a tree

latest.title: Monkeys wash food when grit gets annoying
latest.script_key: monkeys can change habits to solve small problems watch the hands near the food because some monkeys learn useful routines from their group washing or handling food differently can remove grit and make eating easier the habit spreads because it works which primate trick should come next
